xwikidoc.name: ViewDiagramVelocityMacro
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: ViewDiagramVelocityMacro
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} ## For some reason XWiki changes the context when a macro is inserted in the editor, so we need to check for multiple conditions ## the first 2 clauses are for the normal edit action, while the rest handles the update of the context when a macro is updated or inserted in the editor. #set ($isInEditMode = $xcontext.action == 'edit' || $request.outputSyntax == 'annotatedhtml' || ($xcontext.action == 'get' && $request.outputSyntax == 'plain' && $request.sheet=='CKEditor.HTMLConverter')) ## Configuration for the inline diagram macro suite. This is used as default if the ## user doesn't specify a configuration. #set ($defaultConfig = { 'debug': $services.debug.minify.equals(false), 'locale': $xcontext.locale, 'drawIOBasePath': $services.webjars.url('org.xwiki.contrib:draw.io', ''), 'exportURL': $xwiki.getDocument('Diagram.DiagramConfig').getValue('exportURL'), 'pdfImageExportZoom': 0, 'disableExternalServices': $xwiki.getDocument('Diagram.DiagramConfig').getValue('disableExternalServices'), 'isTemporaryUploadSupported': $temporaryUploadSupported }) ## ## Displays internal diagrams. ## @param diagramName the name of the diagram, used for the title. ## @param returnFragment the fragment to which the editor should return after saving the diagram. ## @param diagramConfig the configuration of the diagram, used to initialize the diagram editor. ## @param diagramToolbar the configuration of the diagram toolbar, used to in view mode to display the toolbar. ## @param diagramContent the content of the diagram. ## @param sourceDocumentReference used to identify the source document of the diagram, used by the editor to know ## where to save this diagram. ## @param returnDocumentReference used to identify the document to which the editor should return after saving. ## #macro (displayDiagram $diagramName, $returnFragment, $diagramConfig, $diagramToolbar, $diagramContent, $sourceDocumentReference, $returnDocumentReference, $extraCSSClass, $diagramType) #if ("$!diagramConfig" == "") #set ($diagramConfig = $defaultConfig) #end #set ($returnFragment = $escapetool.xml($returnFragment)) #set ($sourceDocumentReference = $escapetool.xml($sourceDocumentReference)) {{html}}
## After the editor is done loading the diagram it cleans the items that were present in the parent div.
{{/html}} #end ## Display an external diagram. ## @param externalDiagramUrl the URL of the external diagram ## @param diagramConfig the configuration of the diagram, used to initialize the diagram editor. #macro (displayExternalDiagram $externalDiagramUrl, $diagramConfig) #if ("$!diagramConfig" == "") #set ($diagramConfig = $defaultConfig) #end {{html}}
{{/html}} #end ## Determines the type of diagram that the user wants to display and intialize the $sourceDocumentReference, $diagramName and $diagramType. ## There are only 2 types of diagrams: ## * Standalone, diagrams that are stode inside an XWiki page and are requested via a document reference. ## * Inline, diagrams that are stored as attachments of an XWiki page and are requested via an attachment reference. #macro (parseDiagramReference $diagramReference) #set ($diagramType = $NULL) #set ($sourceDocumentReference = $NULL) #set ($diagramName = $NULL) ## If the reference ends with .diagram.xml and has an @ in the name then we consider it an inline diagram. #if ($diagramReference.endsWith('.diagram.xml') && $diagramReference.contains('@')) #set ($diagramType = 'inline') #set ($attachmentReference = $services.model.resolveAttachment($diagramReference)) #set ($sourceDocumentReference = $attachmentReference.getParent()) #set ($attachmentFullName = $attachmentReference.getName()) #set ($diagramName = $attachmentFullName.substring(0, $attachmentFullName.length() - 12)) #else #set ($diagramType = 'standalone') #set ($sourceDocumentReference = $services.model.resolveDocument($diagramReference)) #set ($diagramName = $xwiki.getDocument($sourceDocumentReference).getDisplayTitle()) #end #end ## Responsible for setting the $content variable when a inline diagram is requested. #macro (getInlineDiagramContent $documnetSourceReference, $diagramName) #set ($diagramDocument = $xwiki.getDocument($documnetSourceReference)) #set ($attachmentName = "${diagramName}.diagram.xml") #set ($attachment = $diagramDocument.getAttachment($attachmentName)) #set ($content = "$!attachment.getContentAsString()") #end ## Responsible for setting the $content variable when a standalone diagram is requested. #macro(getStandaloneDiagramContent $documentSourceReference) #set ($diagramDocument = $xwiki.getDocument($documentSourceReference)) #set ($content = "$!diagramDocument.getContent()") #end ## ## Sets the $content variable with the content of the diagram. The content is read from ## the current document if the document parameter is an empty string, otherwise it is read ## from the specified document. ## ## @param document the document from which the diagram content should be read. If empty then the current document is used. ## @param diagramName the name of the diagram, used to find the attachment containing the diagram. ## #macro (getDiagramContent $document, $diagramName, $diagramType) #set ($content = '') #if ("$!diagramType" == 'inline') #getInlineDiagramContent($document, $diagramName) #elseif("$!diagramType" == "standalone") #getStandaloneDiagramContent($document) #end #end ## ## Displays the view of the macro in edit mode. ## ## @param translationKey the translation key of the message to display in edit mode. ## #macro (displayEditMode $translationKey) #set ($unescapedInfoLabel = $services.localization.render($translationKey)) #set ($infoLabel = $services.rendering.escape($unescapedInfoLabel, 'xwiki/2.1')) {{info}}$infoLabel{{/info}} #end {{/velocity}}
